variables.input:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
| fieldsAdd value = if($CostAllocation == "costcenter", dt.cost.costcenter)
| fieldsAdd value = if($CostAllocation == "product", dt.cost.product, else: value)

| fieldsAdd c = coalesce(value, $unassigned)
| expand c
| fieldsAdd c = coalesce(c[key], c)
| summarize c=collectDistinct(c)
| expand c

data json:$ratecard_data
|sort Category
| join [
   FETCH dt.system.events
    | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" 
    | fieldsRename name=event.type
    | fieldsAdd hasCostAllocation = IF(isNull(dt.cost.costcenter) and isNull(dt.cost.product),false ,else: true)
    | summarize cnt_ca=countIf(hasCostAllocation), by:name
], on: { name }, kind: outer, prefix: "included."
| fieldsAdd rateCardFound = if(isnull(name),"no",else:"yes")
| fieldsAdd supported = if(isNull(included.name),"no",else: if(included.cnt_ca==0,"no cost allocation", else: "yes"))
| filter $SupportedCapabilitiesOnly == "no" OR supported == "yes"
| fieldsKeep name

0.content:
## Disclaimer
* ensure to adopt the ratecard_data variable
* Usage of the Dashboard is free of charge

1.title: Used Rate Card and Cost Allocation Status (can be changed by editing the price_point variable <---)
1.query:
data json:$ratecard_data
| join [ data json:$price_points], on: key, prefix:"price."
|sort category
| join [
   FETCH dt.system.events
    | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" 
    | fieldsRename name=event.type
    | fieldsAdd hasCostAllocation = IF(isNull(dt.cost.costcenter) and isNull(dt.cost.product),false ,else: true)
    | summarize cnt_ca=countIf(hasCostAllocation), by:name
], on: { name }, kind: outer, prefix: "included."
| fieldsAdd rateCardFound = if(isnull(name),"no",else:"yes"), ccy=price.currencyCode, price=price.price, unit=price.priceUnit
| fieldsRemove "price.*"
| fieldsAdd costAllocation = if(isNull(costAllocation),"no",else: costAllocation)
| fieldsAdd usageFound = if(isNotNull(included.cnt_ca),"yes",else:"no")
| fieldsAdd costAllocationCorrectlyConfigured = if(costAllocation=="no","n/a", else: if(included.cnt_ca > 0,"yes",else:"no"))
| fieldsRemove "included.*", key
| sort category, name

2.content:
## Change Log
* v 3.8: Fix KPM usage calculation
* v 3.7: Fix for Traces OTel ingest
* v 3.6: Include Metrics ingest, fix filter drop down
* v 3.5: Included RUM total usage (no Cost Allocation support – only "unassigned")
* v 3.4: Fixed calculation error for Retain capabilities, included units to rate card prices for easier configuration
* v 3.3: Adjusted for Log Retain/RwiQ & Fixed Trace Ingest billed usage
* v 3.2: Fixed some overlooked lookup table references
* v 3.1: Dedup events
* v 3.0: Branched a version w/o lookup tables to ensure no related costs

3.title: Estimated cost distribution per Capability
3.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
| filterOut event.type == "Traces - Ingest & Process" //traces ingest needs special handling
| filterOut event.type == "Metrics - Ingest & Process" //metrics ingest needs special handling
| filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
| dedup event.id, event.type
| fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
| fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)
| fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
| expand costallocation
| fieldsAdd filter = coalesce(costallocation[key], costallocation)
| filter in(filter, {$Filter}) or isNull(filter)
| fieldsAdd billed_bytes = coalesce(costallocation[billed_bytes], billed_bytes)
| fieldsAdd usage = coalesce(
    billed_host_hours, //Infra, F&D
    billed_gibibyte_hours, //Fullstack, Runtime Application Protection, Runtime Vulnerability Analytics
    toDouble(billed_bytes) / (1024*1024*1024), //ALL I/R/Q
    billed_invocations, //AppEngine
    ingested_bytes, //Traces I
    billed_sessions, //RUM sessions
    billed_replay_sessions, //rum replay sessions
    billed_property_sessions, //rum properties
    billed_pod_hours, //k8s platform monitoring
    billed_container_hours, //Code Monitoring
    billed_synthetic_action_count, //Browser Monitor
    billed_http_request_count, //HTTP Monitor
    billed_msu_hours, //Mainframe
    1 //workflow count
    )
| fieldsAdd usage = if(contains(event.type,"Retain"),usage / 24, else: usage)
| fieldsAdd usage.start = if(isNull(usage.start), timestamp, else: usage.start)
| makeTimeseries interval: 15m, from: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from) - 30m,
   to: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to), time: usage.start, by:{filter, event.type }, {
  usage = sum(usage),
  start = start()
}
// THIS IS JUST FOR TRACES INGEST NORMALIZATION ----->
| append [
      fetch dt.system.events
      | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Traces - Ingest & Process"
      | filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
      | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
      | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation
      | filter in(filter, {$Filter}) or isnull(filter)
      | fieldsKeep usage.start, licensing_type, ingested_bytes, costallocation, event.id
      | dedup event.id
      | fieldsAdd licensing_type = if(in(licensing_type, {
        "otlp-trace-ingest", "serverless"}), "other", else: licensing_type)

      | fieldsAdd adaptive_volume = if(licensing_type == "fullstack-adaptive", ingested_bytes)
      | fieldsAdd fixed_rate_volume = if(licensing_type == "fullstack-fixed-rate", ingested_bytes)
      | fieldsAdd other_volume = if(licensing_type == "other", ingested_bytes)

      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)

      | makeTimeseries interval: 15m, time: usage.start, by: {
        costallocation}, nonempty: true, {
        adaptive_volume = sum(adaptive_volume, default: 0),
        fixed_rate_volume = sum(fixed_rate_volume, default: 0),
        other_volume = sum(other_volume, default: 0),
        start = start()
      } 

        // calculate included volume per costcenter and join with trace-ingest usage
      | join [
          fetch dt.system.events, from: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from), to: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to) + 10min
          | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
          | filter event.type == "Full-Stack Monitoring"
          | fieldsAdd cap_type = "Traces - Ingest & Process"
          | filter in(cap_type, {$Capability}) //only query if trace ingest selected
          | dedup event.id, event.type
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
          | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
          | fieldsKeep usage.start, billed_gibibyte_hours, costallocation, event.id
          | makeTimeseries {
            billed = sum(billed_gibibyte_hours, default: 0) }, by: {
            costallocation }, time: usage.start, interval: 15m
          | summarize by: {
            timeframe, interval }, {
            total = sum(billed[]), r = collectArray(record(costallocation, billed)) }
          | expand r
          | fieldsFlatten r, fields: {
            costallocation, billed }
          | fieldsAdd ratio = iCollectArray(coalesce((billed)[] / total[], 0.0))
          | fields timeframe, interval, costallocation, ratio, billed, total
          | join [
              timeseries interval: 15m, union: true, nonempty: true, bucket: {"default_metrics"}, {
                included_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_included_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: 0),
                configured_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_configured_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: 0)
              }
              | fieldsAdd interval_in_minutes = toLong(interval) / 60000000000
              | fieldsAdd extra_ingest_on = configured_volume[] > included_volume[]
              | fieldsAdd included_volume = interval_in_minutes * if(isNull(configured_volume[]), null, else: included_volume[])
          
          ], on: {
            timeframe, interval }, fields: {
            included_volume, extra_ingest_on }
          | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = included_volume[] * ratio[]
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), "unassigned", else: costallocation)
          /**/
      ], on: {
         interval, costallocation }, kind: outer, prefix: "included."
       | fieldsAdd timeframe = coalesce(timeframe, included.timeframe)
       | fieldsAdd interval = coalesce(interval, included.interval)
       | fieldsAdd costallocation = coalesce(costallocation, included.costallocation)
      | join [
      //this creates an array of 0 with the correct length based on timeframe
        data
          record(a = 0)
          | makeTimeseries empty_included = avg(a, default: 0), interval: 15min, nonempty:true, time: now()
      ], on: { interval }, fields: { empty_included}, kind: outer
      //this creates an array of false with the correct length based on timeframe
      | join [
        data
          record(a = 0)
          | makeTimeseries empty_included = avg(a, default: 0), interval: 15min, nonempty:true, time: now()
          | expand empty_included
          | fieldsAdd all_false = empty_included==1
          | summarize all_false = collectArray(all_false), by: interval
      ], on: { interval }, fields: { all_false}
      //In cases where there's a costallocation in our BUE's but not in the included, set extra_ingest_on to false for each interval
      | fieldsAdd
          extra_ingest_on =
              if(exists(included.extra_ingest_on) and isNotNull(included.extra_ingest_on), included.extra_ingest_on,
                else: all_false)
      //We'll use this one to slice the others down to size
      | fieldsAdd adaptive_volume = coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(adaptive_volume[], 0)), empty_included)
      //Get rid of nulls, and make sure we're keeping only as many items as match our "volume"
      | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = arraySlice(coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(included.included_volume_costallocation[], 0)), empty_included), to: arraySize(adaptive_volume))
      //Replace nulls with 0
      | fieldsAdd fixed_rate_volume = coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(fixed_rate_volume[], 0)), empty_included)
      | fieldsAdd other_volume = coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(other_volume[], 0)), empty_included)
      | fieldsKeep timeframe, interval, costallocation, adaptive_volume, fixed_rate_volume, other_volume,
          included_volume_costallocation, extra_ingest_on, empty_included, start
     // calculate fullstack trace-ingest usage per costcenter
     | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = arraySlice(included_volume_costallocation, to: arraySize(adaptive_volume)) //Since we're looking into the future with included, cut off any "extra"
     | fieldsAdd license_remaining = included_volume_costallocation[] - adaptive_volume[]
     | fieldsAdd license_remaining = if(license_remaining[] > 0, license_remaining[], else: 0)
     | fieldsAdd extra_ingest_on = arraySlice(extra_ingest_on, to: arraySize(adaptive_volume)) //Depending on time frame, we can end up with an extra value here
     | fieldsAdd
          billable_fullstack =
              if(isNull(included_volume_costallocation[]), 0,
                else: if(extra_ingest_on[], adaptive_volume[] + fixed_rate_volume[] - included_volume_costallocation[],
                  else: fixed_rate_volume[] - license_remaining[]))

      | fieldsAdd billable_fullstack = if(billable_fullstack[] > 0, billable_fullstack[], else: 0)

      | summarize {
        total_included = sum(included_volume_costallocation[]),
        total_adaptive = sum(adaptive_volume[]),
        total_fixed_rate = sum(fixed_rate_volume[]),
        total_fullstack_to_allocate = sum(billable_fullstack[]),
        per_costallocation = collectArray(record(extra_ingest_on, billable_fullstack, billable_other = other_volume, costallocation, included_volume_costallocation, start))},
        by: { interval }
      | expand per_costallocation
      | fieldsFlatten per_costallocation
      | fieldsRemove per_costallocation

      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = total_included[] - total_adaptive[]
      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = if(total_license_remaining[] > 0, total_license_remaining[], else: 0)
      | fieldsAdd
          total_applicable_fullstack =
              if(isNull(per_costallocation.included_volume_costallocation), 0,
                else: if(per_costallocation.extra_ingest_on[], total_adaptive[] + total_fixed_rate[] - total_included[],
                  else: total_fixed_rate[] - total_license_remaining[]))
      | fieldsAdd total_billable_fullstack = if(total_applicable_fullstack[] > 0, total_applicable_fullstack[], else: 0)

      | fieldsAdd
          distributed_fullstack =

                else: per_costallocation.billable_fullstack[] / total_fullstack_to_allocate[] * total_billable_fullstack[])
      // filter out  entry if the included was not fetched
      | fieldsAdd
          adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation =
              per_costallocation.billable_other[] + toDouble(distributed_fullstack[])
     | filterOut isNull(adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation) or isNull(per_costallocation.start) or IsNull(per_costallocation.costallocation)
     | fields interval, costallocation = per_costallocation.costallocation, adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation, start=per_costallocation.start
     | fieldsAdd event.type ="Traces - Ingest & Process"
     | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation

]

| fieldsAdd filter = coalesce(costallocation[key], costallocation)
| filter in(filter, {$Filter}) or isNull(filter)

    billed_host_hours, //Infra, F&D

    1 //workflow count
    )
| fieldsAdd usage = if(contains(event.type,"Retain"),usage / 24, else: usage)
| fieldsAdd usage.start = if(isNull(usage.start), timestamp, else: usage.start)
| makeTimeseries interval: 15m, 

   time: usage.start, by:{filter, event.type }, {

}
// THIS IS JUST FOR TRACES INGEST NORMALIZATION ----->
| append [
      fetch dt.system.events
      | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Traces - Ingest & Process"
      | filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
      | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
      | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation
      | filter in(filter, {$Filter}) or isnull(filter)
      | fieldsKeep usage.start, licensing_type, ingested_bytes, costallocation, event.id
      | dedup event.id
      | fieldsAdd licensing_type = if(in(licensing_type, {
        "otlp-trace-ingest", "serverless"}), "other", else: licensing_type)

      | fieldsAdd adaptive_volume = if(licensing_type == "fullstack-adaptive", ingested_bytes)
      | fieldsAdd fixed_rate_volume = if(licensing_type == "fullstack-fixed-rate", ingested_bytes)
      | fieldsAdd other_volume = if(licensing_type == "other", ingested_bytes)

      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)

      | makeTimeseries interval: 15m, time: usage.start, by: {
        costallocation}, nonempty: true, {
        adaptive_volume = sum(adaptive_volume, default: 0),
        fixed_rate_volume = sum(fixed_rate_volume, default: 0),
        other_volume = sum(other_volume, default: 0),
        start = start()
      } 

        // calculate included volume per costcenter and join with trace-ingest usage
      | join [
          fetch dt.system.events, from: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from), to: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to) + 10min
          | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
          | filter event.type == "Full-Stack Monitoring"
          | fieldsAdd cap_type = "Traces - Ingest & Process"
          | filter in(cap_type, {$Capability}) //only query if trace ingest selected
          | dedup event.id, event.type
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
          | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
          | fieldsKeep usage.start, billed_gibibyte_hours, costallocation, event.id
          | makeTimeseries {
            billed = sum(billed_gibibyte_hours, default: 0) }, by: {
            costallocation }, time: usage.start, interval: 15m
          | summarize by: {
            timeframe, interval }, {
            total = sum(billed[]), r = collectArray(record(costallocation, billed)) }
          | expand r
          | fieldsFlatten r, fields: {
            costallocation, billed }
          | fieldsAdd ratio = iCollectArray(coalesce((billed)[] / total[], 0.0))
          | fields timeframe, interval, costallocation, ratio, billed, total
          | join [
              timeseries interval: 15m, union: true, nonempty: true, bucket: {"default_metrics"}, {
                included_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_included_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: 0),
                configured_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_configured_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: 0)
              }
              | fieldsAdd interval_in_minutes = toLong(interval) / 60000000000
              | fieldsAdd extra_ingest_on = configured_volume[] > included_volume[]
              | fieldsAdd included_volume = interval_in_minutes * if(isNull(configured_volume[]), null, else: included_volume[])
          
          ], on: {
            timeframe, interval }, fields: {
            included_volume, extra_ingest_on }
          | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = included_volume[] * ratio[]
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), "unassigned", else: costallocation)
          /**/
      ], on: {
         interval, costallocation }, kind: outer, prefix: "included."
       | fieldsAdd timeframe = coalesce(timeframe, included.timeframe)
       | fieldsAdd interval = coalesce(interval, included.interval)
       | fieldsAdd costallocation = coalesce(costallocation, included.costallocation)
      | join [
      //this creates an array of 0 with the correct length based on timeframe
        data
          record(a = 0)
          | makeTimeseries empty_included = avg(a, default: 0), interval: 15min, nonempty:true, time: now()
      ], on: { interval }, fields: { empty_included}, kind: outer
      //this creates an array of false with the correct length based on timeframe
      | join [
        data
          record(a = 0)
          | makeTimeseries empty_included = avg(a, default: 0), interval: 15min, nonempty:true, time: now()
          | expand empty_included
          | fieldsAdd all_false = empty_included==1
          | summarize all_false = collectArray(all_false), by: interval
      ], on: { interval }, fields: { all_false}
      //In cases where there's a costallocation in our BUE's but not in the included, set extra_ingest_on to false for each interval
      | fieldsAdd
          extra_ingest_on =
              if(exists(included.extra_ingest_on) and isNotNull(included.extra_ingest_on), included.extra_ingest_on,
                else: all_false)
      //We'll use this one to slice the others down to size
      | fieldsAdd adaptive_volume = coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(adaptive_volume[], 0)), empty_included)
      //Get rid of nulls, and make sure we're keeping only as many items as match our "volume"
      | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = arraySlice(coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(included.included_volume_costallocation[], 0)), empty_included), to: arraySize(adaptive_volume))
      //Replace nulls with 0
      | fieldsAdd fixed_rate_volume = coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(fixed_rate_volume[], 0)), empty_included)
      | fieldsAdd other_volume = coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(other_volume[], 0)), empty_included)
      | fieldsKeep timeframe, interval, costallocation, adaptive_volume, fixed_rate_volume, other_volume,
          included_volume_costallocation, extra_ingest_on, empty_included, start
     // calculate fullstack trace-ingest usage per costcenter
     | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = arraySlice(included_volume_costallocation, to: arraySize(adaptive_volume)) //Since we're looking into the future with included, cut off any "extra"
     | fieldsAdd license_remaining = included_volume_costallocation[] - adaptive_volume[]
     | fieldsAdd license_remaining = if(license_remaining[] > 0, license_remaining[], else: 0)
     | fieldsAdd extra_ingest_on = arraySlice(extra_ingest_on, to: arraySize(adaptive_volume)) //Depending on time frame, we can end up with an extra value here
     | fieldsAdd
          billable_fullstack =
              if(isNull(included_volume_costallocation[]), 0,
                else: if(extra_ingest_on[], adaptive_volume[] + fixed_rate_volume[] - included_volume_costallocation[],
                  else: fixed_rate_volume[] - license_remaining[]))

      | fieldsAdd billable_fullstack = if(billable_fullstack[] > 0, billable_fullstack[], else: 0)

      | summarize {
        total_included = sum(included_volume_costallocation[]),
        total_adaptive = sum(adaptive_volume[]),
        total_fixed_rate = sum(fixed_rate_volume[]),
        total_fullstack_to_allocate = sum(billable_fullstack[]),
        per_costallocation = collectArray(record(extra_ingest_on, billable_fullstack, billable_other = other_volume, costallocation, included_volume_costallocation, start))},
        by: { interval }
      | expand per_costallocation
      | fieldsFlatten per_costallocation
      | fieldsRemove per_costallocation

      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = total_included[] - total_adaptive[]
      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = if(total_license_remaining[] > 0, total_license_remaining[], else: 0)
      | fieldsAdd
          total_applicable_fullstack =
              if(isNull(per_costallocation.included_volume_costallocation), 0,
                else: if(per_costallocation.extra_ingest_on[], total_adaptive[] + total_fixed_rate[] - total_included[],
                  else: total_fixed_rate[] - total_license_remaining[]))
      | fieldsAdd total_billable_fullstack = if(total_applicable_fullstack[] > 0, total_applicable_fullstack[], else: 0)

      | fieldsAdd
          distributed_fullstack =
              if(total_fullstack_to_allocate[] <= 0, 0,
                else: per_costallocation.billable_fullstack[] / total_fullstack_to_allocate[] * total_billable_fullstack[])
      // filter out  entry if the included was not fetched
      | fieldsAdd
          adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation =
              per_costallocation.billable_other[] + toDouble(distributed_fullstack[])
     | filterOut isNull(adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation) or isNull(per_costallocation.start) or IsNull(per_costallocation.costallocation)
     | fields interval, costallocation = per_costallocation.costallocation, adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation, start=per_costallocation.start
     | fieldsAdd event.type ="Traces - Ingest & Process"
     | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation

]

          | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
          | filter event.type == "Full-Stack Monitoring"
          | fieldsAdd cap_type = "Traces - Ingest & Process"
          | filter in(cap_type, {$Capability}) //only query if trace ingest selected
          | dedup event.id, event.type
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
          | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
          | fieldsKeep usage.start, billed_gibibyte_hours, costallocation, event.id
          | makeTimeseries {
            billed = sum(billed_gibibyte_hours, default: 0) }, by: {
            costallocation }, time: usage.start, interval: 15m
          | summarize by: {
            timeframe, interval }, {
            total = sum(billed[]), r = collectArray(record(costallocation, billed)) }
          | expand r
          | fieldsFlatten r, fields: {
            costallocation, billed }
          | fieldsAdd ratio = iCollectArray(coalesce((billed)[] / total[], 0.0))
          | fields timeframe, interval, costallocation, ratio, billed, total
          | join [
              timeseries interval: 15m, union: true, nonempty: true, bucket: {"default_metrics"}, {
                included_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_included_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: 0),
                configured_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_configured_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: 0)
              }
              | fieldsAdd interval_in_minutes = toLong(interval) / 60000000000
              | fieldsAdd extra_ingest_on = configured_volume[] > included_volume[]
              | fieldsAdd included_volume = interval_in_minutes * if(isNull(configured_volume[]), null, else: included_volume[])
          
          ], on: {
            timeframe, interval }, fields: {
            included_volume, extra_ingest_on }
          | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = included_volume[] * ratio[]
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), "unassigned", else: costallocation)
          /**/
      ], on: {
         interval, costallocation }, kind: outer, prefix: "included."
       | fieldsAdd timeframe = coalesce(timeframe, included.timeframe)
       | fieldsAdd interval = coalesce(interval, included.interval)
       | fieldsAdd costallocation = coalesce(costallocation, included.costallocation)
      | join [
      //this creates an array of 0 with the correct length based on timeframe
        data
          record(a = 0)
          | makeTimeseries empty_included = avg(a, default: 0), interval: 15min, nonempty:true, time: now()
      ], on: { interval }, fields: { empty_included}, kind: outer
      //this creates an array of false with the correct length based on timeframe
      | join [
        data
          record(a = 0)
          | makeTimeseries empty_included = avg(a, default: 0), interval: 15min, nonempty:true, time: now()
          | expand empty_included
          | fieldsAdd all_false = empty_included==1
          | summarize all_false = collectArray(all_false), by: interval
      ], on: { interval }, fields: { all_false}
      //In cases where there's a costallocation in our BUE's but not in the included, set extra_ingest_on to false for each interval
      | fieldsAdd
          extra_ingest_on =
              if(exists(included.extra_ingest_on) and isNotNull(included.extra_ingest_on), included.extra_ingest_on,
                else: all_false)
      //We'll use this one to slice the others down to size
      | fieldsAdd adaptive_volume = coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(adaptive_volume[], 0)), empty_included)
      //Get rid of nulls, and make sure we're keeping only as many items as match our "volume"
      | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = arraySlice(coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(included.included_volume_costallocation[], 0)), empty_included), to: arraySize(adaptive_volume))
      //Replace nulls with 0
      | fieldsAdd fixed_rate_volume = coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(fixed_rate_volume[], 0)), empty_included)
      | fieldsAdd other_volume = coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(other_volume[], 0)), empty_included)
      | fieldsKeep timeframe, interval, costallocation, adaptive_volume, fixed_rate_volume, other_volume,
          included_volume_costallocation, extra_ingest_on, empty_included, start
     // calculate fullstack trace-ingest usage per costcenter
     | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = arraySlice(included_volume_costallocation, to: arraySize(adaptive_volume)) //Since we're looking into the future with included, cut off any "extra"
     | fieldsAdd license_remaining = included_volume_costallocation[] - adaptive_volume[]
     | fieldsAdd license_remaining = if(license_remaining[] > 0, license_remaining[], else: 0)
     | fieldsAdd extra_ingest_on = arraySlice(extra_ingest_on, to: arraySize(adaptive_volume)) //Depending on time frame, we can end up with an extra value here
     | fieldsAdd
          billable_fullstack =
              if(isNull(included_volume_costallocation[]), 0,
                else: if(extra_ingest_on[], adaptive_volume[] + fixed_rate_volume[] - included_volume_costallocation[],
                  else: fixed_rate_volume[] - license_remaining[]))

      | fieldsAdd billable_fullstack = if(billable_fullstack[] > 0, billable_fullstack[], else: 0)

      | summarize {
        total_included = sum(included_volume_costallocation[]),
        total_adaptive = sum(adaptive_volume[]),
        total_fixed_rate = sum(fixed_rate_volume[]),
        total_fullstack_to_allocate = sum(billable_fullstack[]),
        per_costallocation = collectArray(record(extra_ingest_on, billable_fullstack, billable_other = other_volume, costallocation, included_volume_costallocation, start))},
        by: { interval }
      | expand per_costallocation
      | fieldsFlatten per_costallocation
      | fieldsRemove per_costallocation

      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = total_included[] - total_adaptive[]
      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = if(total_license_remaining[] > 0, total_license_remaining[], else: 0)
      | fieldsAdd
          total_applicable_fullstack =
              if(isNull(per_costallocation.included_volume_costallocation), 0,
                else: if(per_costallocation.extra_ingest_on[], total_adaptive[] + total_fixed_rate[] - total_included[],
                  else: total_fixed_rate[] - total_license_remaining[]))
      | fieldsAdd total_billable_fullstack = if(total_applicable_fullstack[] > 0, total_applicable_fullstack[], else: 0)

      | fieldsAdd
          distributed_fullstack =
              if(total_fullstack_to_allocate[] <= 0, 0,
                else: per_costallocation.billable_fullstack[] / total_fullstack_to_allocate[] * total_billable_fullstack[])
      // filter out  entry if the included was not fetched
      | fieldsAdd
          adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation =
              per_costallocation.billable_other[] + toDouble(distributed_fullstack[])
     | filterOut isNull(adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation) or isNull(per_costallocation.start) or IsNull(per_costallocation.costallocation)
     | fields interval, costallocation = per_costallocation.costallocation, adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation, start=per_costallocation.start
     | fieldsAdd event.type ="Traces - Ingest & Process"
     | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation

] 
| fieldsAdd traces_usage = adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation[] / (1024*1024*1024)
// <---------THIS IS JUST FOR TRACES INGEST NORMALIZATION

// THIS IS JUST FOR METRICS INGEST NORMALIZATION ----->
| append [
      fetch dt.system.events, from: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from) + 4h, to: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to) + 4h
      | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Metrics - Ingest & Process"
      | filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
      | dedup event.id, event.type
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
      | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
      | expand costallocation
      | fieldsFlatten costallocation
      | fields {
        usage.start,
        costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation.key), $unassigned, else: costallocation.key),
        data_points = toLong(costallocation.data_points),
        monitoring_source = if(monitoring_source == "fullstack" or monitoring_source == "infrastructure", monitoring_source, else: "other")
      }
      | summarize {
        data_points = toLong(sum(data_points))
      }, by: {
        usage.start,
        costallocation,
        monitoring_source
      }
      | join [
          fetch dt.system.events, from: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from), to: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to) + 1h
          | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and in(event.type, { "Full-Stack Monitoring", "Infrastructure Monitoring" })
          | fieldsAdd cap_type = "Metrics - Ingest & Process"
          | filter in(cap_type, {$Capability}) //only query if metrics ingest selected
          | dedup event.id, event.type
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
          | fields {
            usage.start,
            costallocation = if(isNotNull(costallocation), costallocation, else: $unassigned),
            billed_value = coalesce(if(exists(billed_gibibyte_hours), billed_gibibyte_hours, else: null), if(exists(billed_host_hours), billed_host_hours, else: null)),
            monitoring_source = if(event.type == "Full-Stack Monitoring", "fullstack", else: if(event.type == "Infrastructure Monitoring", "infrastructure"))
          }
          | summarize {
            billed = sum(billed_value)
          }, by: {
            usage.start,
            costallocation,
            monitoring_source
          }
          | fields {
            usage.start,
            costallocation,
            monitoring_source,
            billed,
            included_usage =  billed * 4 * if(monitoring_source == "fullstack", 900, else: if(monitoring_source == "infrastructure", 1500, else: 0))
          }
      ], on: { usage.start, costallocation, monitoring_source }, kind:leftOuter, fields: { included_usage }
      | fieldsAdd included_usage = if(isNotNull(included_usage), included_usage, else: 0)
      | fieldsAdd billable = if(data_points > included_usage, data_points - included_usage, else: 0)
      | summarize {
        data_points_total = sum(data_points),
        included_total = sum(included_usage),
        billable_per_costallocation_total = sum(billable),
        rec = collectArray(record(costallocation, billable, included_usage))
      }, by: {
        usage.start,
        monitoring_source
      }
      | fieldsAdd actual_billable_total = if(data_points_total > included_total, data_points_total - included_total, else: 0)
      | expand rec
      | fieldsAdd ratio_for_cost_allocation = rec[billable] / billable_per_costallocation_total
      | fieldsAdd charged_per_costcenter = ratio_for_cost_allocation * actual_billable_total
      | fields usage = charged_per_costcenter, usage.start, costallocation = rec[costallocation]
      | makeTimeseries {usage = sum(usage), start=start()}, from:toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from), to:toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to), time:usage.start, interval: 15m, by:{costallocation}
      | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation
      | fieldsAdd event.type = "Metrics - Ingest & Process"
      | filter in(filter, {$Filter})
]
// <---------THIS IS JUST FOR METRICS INGEST NORMALIZATION

| lookup [
   data json:$price_points
], sourceField:event.type, lookupField:name, prefix: "ratecard."
| fieldsAdd isnull = isNull(adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation)
| fieldsAdd usage = if(isnull, usage, else: traces_usage)
| fieldsAdd cost = usage[] * toDouble(ratecard.price) / toDouble(ratecard.priceUnit)
| fieldsAdd cost = arraySum(cost)
| fieldsAdd usage = arraySum(usage)
//The summarize details would change based on intended tile
| summarize {total_usage=sum(usage), total_cost=sum(cost)}, by:{category=ratecard.Category}
| sort total_cost desc

6.title: List of usage and estimated costs per Capability
6.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
| filterOut event.type == "Traces - Ingest & Process" //traces ingest needs special handling
| filterOut event.type == "Metrics - Ingest & Process" //metrics ingest needs special handling
| filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
| dedup event.id, event.type
| fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
| fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)
| fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
| expand costallocation
| fieldsAdd filter = coalesce(costallocation[key], costallocation)
| filter in(filter, {$Filter}) or isNull(filter)
| fieldsAdd billed_bytes = coalesce(costallocation[billed_bytes], billed_bytes)
| fieldsAdd usage = coalesce(
    billed_host_hours, //Infra, F&D
    billed_gibibyte_hours, //Fullstack, Runtime Application Protection, Runtime Vulnerability Analytics
    toDouble(billed_bytes) / (1024*1024*1024), //ALL I/R/Q
    billed_invocations, //AppEngine
    ingested_bytes, //Traces I
    billed_sessions, //RUM sessions
    billed_replay_sessions, //rum replay sessions
    billed_property_sessions, //rum properties
    billed_pod_hours, //k8s platform monitoring
    billed_container_hours, //Code Monitoring
    billed_synthetic_action_count, //Browser Monitor
    billed_http_request_count, //HTTP Monitor
    billed_msu_hours, //Mainframe
    1 //workflow count
    )
| fieldsAdd usage = if(contains(event.type,"Retain"),usage / 24, else: usage)
| fieldsAdd usage.start = if(isNull(usage.start), timestamp, else: usage.start)
| makeTimeseries interval: 15m, from: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from) - 30m,
   to: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to), time: usage.start, by:{filter, event.type }, {
  usage = sum(usage),
  start = start()
}
// THIS IS JUST FOR TRACES INGEST NORMALIZATION ----->
| append [
      fetch dt.system.events
      | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Traces - Ingest & Process"
      | filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
      | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
      | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation
      | filter in(filter, {$Filter}) or isnull(filter)
      | fieldsKeep usage.start, licensing_type, ingested_bytes, costallocation, event.id
      | dedup event.id
      | fieldsAdd licensing_type = if(in(licensing_type, {
        "otlp-trace-ingest", "serverless"}), "other", else: licensing_type)

      | fieldsAdd adaptive_volume = if(licensing_type == "fullstack-adaptive", ingested_bytes)
      | fieldsAdd fixed_rate_volume = if(licensing_type == "fullstack-fixed-rate", ingested_bytes)
      | fieldsAdd other_volume = if(licensing_type == "other", ingested_bytes)

      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)

      | makeTimeseries interval: 15m, time: usage.start, by: {
        costallocation}, nonempty: true, {
        adaptive_volume = sum(adaptive_volume, default: 0),
        fixed_rate_volume = sum(fixed_rate_volume, default: 0),
        other_volume = sum(other_volume, default: 0),
        start = start()
      } 

        // calculate included volume per costcenter and join with trace-ingest usage
      | join [
          fetch dt.system.events, from: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from), to: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to) + 10min
          | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
          | filter event.type == "Full-Stack Monitoring"
          | fieldsAdd cap_type = "Traces - Ingest & Process"
          | filter in(cap_type, {$Capability}) //only query if trace ingest selected
          | dedup event.id, event.type
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
          | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
          | fieldsKeep usage.start, billed_gibibyte_hours, costallocation, event.id
          | makeTimeseries {
            billed = sum(billed_gibibyte_hours, default: 0) }, by: {
            costallocation }, time: usage.start, interval: 15m
          | summarize by: {
            timeframe, interval }, {
            total = sum(billed[]), r = collectArray(record(costallocation, billed)) }
          | expand r
          | fieldsFlatten r, fields: {
            costallocation, billed }
          | fieldsAdd ratio = iCollectArray(coalesce((billed)[] / total[], 0.0))
          | fields timeframe, interval, costallocation, ratio, billed, total
          | join [
              timeseries interval: 15m, union: true, nonempty: true, bucket: {"default_metrics"}, {
                included_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_included_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: 0),
                configured_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_configured_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: 0)
              }
              | fieldsAdd interval_in_minutes = toLong(interval) / 60000000000
              | fieldsAdd extra_ingest_on = configured_volume[] > included_volume[]
              | fieldsAdd included_volume = interval_in_minutes * if(isNull(configured_volume[]), null, else: included_volume[])
          
          ], on: {
            timeframe, interval }, fields: {
            included_volume, extra_ingest_on }
          | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = included_volume[] * ratio[]
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), "unassigned", else: costallocation)
          /**/
      ], on: {
         interval, costallocation }, kind: outer, prefix: "included."
       | fieldsAdd timeframe = coalesce(timeframe, included.timeframe)
       | fieldsAdd interval = coalesce(interval, included.interval)
       | fieldsAdd costallocation = coalesce(costallocation, included.costallocation)
      | join [
      //this creates an array of 0 with the correct length based on timeframe
        data
          record(a = 0)
          | makeTimeseries empty_included = avg(a, default: 0), interval: 15min, nonempty:true, time: now()
      ], on: { interval }, fields: { empty_included}, kind: outer
      //this creates an array of false with the correct length based on timeframe
      | join [
        data
          record(a = 0)
          | makeTimeseries empty_included = avg(a, default: 0), interval: 15min, nonempty:true, time: now()
          | expand empty_included
          | fieldsAdd all_false = empty_included==1
          | summarize all_false = collectArray(all_false), by: interval
      ], on: { interval }, fields: { all_false}
      //In cases where there's a costallocation in our BUE's but not in the included, set extra_ingest_on to false for each interval
      | fieldsAdd
          extra_ingest_on =
              if(exists(included.extra_ingest_on) and isNotNull(included.extra_ingest_on), included.extra_ingest_on,
                else: all_false)
      //We'll use this one to slice the others down to size
      | fieldsAdd adaptive_volume = coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(adaptive_volume[], 0)), empty_included)
      //Get rid of nulls, and make sure we're keeping only as many items as match our "volume"
      | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = arraySlice(coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(included.included_volume_costallocation[], 0)), empty_included), to: arraySize(adaptive_volume))
      //Replace nulls with 0
      | fieldsAdd fixed_rate_volume = coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(fixed_rate_volume[], 0)), empty_included)
      | fieldsAdd other_volume = coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(other_volume[], 0)), empty_included)
      | fieldsKeep timeframe, interval, costallocation, adaptive_volume, fixed_rate_volume, other_volume,
          included_volume_costallocation, extra_ingest_on, empty_included, start
     // calculate fullstack trace-ingest usage per costcenter
     | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = arraySlice(included_volume_costallocation, to: arraySize(adaptive_volume)) //Since we're looking into the future with included, cut off any "extra"
     | fieldsAdd license_remaining = included_volume_costallocation[] - adaptive_volume[]
     | fieldsAdd license_remaining = if(license_remaining[] > 0, license_remaining[], else: 0)
     | fieldsAdd extra_ingest_on = arraySlice(extra_ingest_on, to: arraySize(adaptive_volume)) //Depending on time frame, we can end up with an extra value here
     | fieldsAdd
          billable_fullstack =
              if(isNull(included_volume_costallocation[]), 0,
                else: if(extra_ingest_on[], adaptive_volume[] + fixed_rate_volume[] - included_volume_costallocation[],
                  else: fixed_rate_volume[] - license_remaining[]))

      | fieldsAdd billable_fullstack = if(billable_fullstack[] > 0, billable_fullstack[], else: 0)

      | summarize {
        total_included = sum(included_volume_costallocation[]),
        total_adaptive = sum(adaptive_volume[]),
        total_fixed_rate = sum(fixed_rate_volume[]),
        total_fullstack_to_allocate = sum(billable_fullstack[]),
        per_costallocation = collectArray(record(extra_ingest_on, billable_fullstack, billable_other = other_volume, costallocation, included_volume_costallocation, start))},
        by: { interval }
      | expand per_costallocation
      | fieldsFlatten per_costallocation
      | fieldsRemove per_costallocation

      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = total_included[] - total_adaptive[]
      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = if(total_license_remaining[] > 0, total_license_remaining[], else: 0)
      | fieldsAdd
          total_applicable_fullstack =
              if(isNull(per_costallocation.included_volume_costallocation), 0,
                else: if(per_costallocation.extra_ingest_on[], total_adaptive[] + total_fixed_rate[] - total_included[],
                  else: total_fixed_rate[] - total_license_remaining[]))
      | fieldsAdd total_billable_fullstack = if(total_applicable_fullstack[] > 0, total_applicable_fullstack[], else: 0)

      | fieldsAdd
          distributed_fullstack =
              if(total_fullstack_to_allocate[] <= 0, 0,
                else: per_costallocation.billable_fullstack[] / total_fullstack_to_allocate[] * total_billable_fullstack[])
      // filter out  entry if the included was not fetched
      | fieldsAdd
          adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation =
              per_costallocation.billable_other[] + toDouble(distributed_fullstack[])
     | filterOut isNull(adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation) or isNull(per_costallocation.start) or IsNull(per_costallocation.costallocation)
     | fields interval, costallocation = per_costallocation.costallocation, adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation, start=per_costallocation.start
     | fieldsAdd event.type ="Traces - Ingest & Process"
     | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation

] 
| fieldsAdd traces_usage = adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation[] / (1024*1024*1024)

      | fieldsAdd ratio_for_cost_allocation = rec[billable] / billable_per_costallocation_total
      | fieldsAdd charged_per_costcenter = ratio_for_cost_allocation * actual_billable_total
      | fields usage = charged_per_costcenter, usage.start, costallocation = rec[costallocation]
      | makeTimeseries {usage = sum(usage), start=start()}, from:toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from), to:toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to), time:usage.start, interval: 15m, by:{costallocation}
      | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation
      | fieldsAdd event.type = "Metrics - Ingest & Process"
      | filter in(filter, {$Filter})
]
// <---------THIS IS JUST FOR METRICS INGEST NORMALIZATION

| lookup [
   data json:$price_points
], sourceField:event.type, lookupField:name, prefix: "ratecard."
| fieldsAdd isnull = isNull(adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation)
| fieldsAdd usage = if(isnull, usage, else: traces_usage)
| fieldsAdd cost = usage[] * toDouble(ratecard.price) / toDouble(ratecard.priceUnit)
| fieldsAdd cost = arraySum(cost)
| fieldsAdd usage = arraySum(usage)
//The summarize details would change based on intended tile
| filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
| summarize {total_usage=sum(usage), total_cost=sum(cost)}, by:{capability=event.type, category=ratecard.Category}
| sort total_cost desc

8.title: List of usage and estimated costs per Capability and Cost Center
8.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
| filterOut event.type == "Traces - Ingest & Process" //traces ingest needs special handling
| filterOut event.type == "Metrics - Ingest & Process" //metrics ingest needs special handling
| filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
| dedup event.id, event.type
| fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
| fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)
| fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
| expand costallocation
| fieldsAdd filter = coalesce(costallocation[key], costallocation)
| filter in(filter, {$Filter}) or isNull(filter)
| fieldsAdd billed_bytes = coalesce(costallocation[billed_bytes], billed_bytes)
| fieldsAdd usage = coalesce(
    billed_host_hours, //Infra, F&D
    billed_gibibyte_hours, //Fullstack, Runtime Application Protection, Runtime Vulnerability Analytics
    toDouble(billed_bytes) / (1024*1024*1024), //ALL I/R/Q
    billed_invocations, //AppEngine
    ingested_bytes, //Traces I
    billed_sessions, //RUM sessions
    billed_replay_sessions, //rum replay sessions
    billed_property_sessions, //rum properties
    billed_pod_hours, //k8s platform monitoring
    billed_container_hours, //Code Monitoring
    billed_synthetic_action_count, //Browser Monitor
    billed_http_request_count, //HTTP Monitor
    billed_msu_hours, //Mainframe
    1 //workflow count
    )
| fieldsAdd usage = if(contains(event.type,"Retain"),usage / 24, else: usage)
| fieldsAdd usage.start = if(isNull(usage.start), timestamp, else: usage.start)
| makeTimeseries interval: 15m, from: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from) - 30m,
   to: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to), time: usage.start, by:{filter, event.type }, {
  usage = sum(usage),
  start = start()
}
// THIS IS JUST FOR TRACES INGEST NORMALIZATION ----->
| append [
      fetch dt.system.events
      | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Traces - Ingest & Process"
      | filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
      | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
      | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation
      | filter in(filter, {$Filter}) or isnull(filter)
      | fieldsKeep usage.start, licensing_type, ingested_bytes, costallocation, event.id
      | dedup event.id
      | fieldsAdd licensing_type = if(in(licensing_type, {
        "otlp-trace-ingest", "serverless"}), "other", else: licensing_type)

      | fieldsAdd adaptive_volume = if(licensing_type == "fullstack-adaptive", ingested_bytes)
      | fieldsAdd fixed_rate_volume = if(licensing_type == "fullstack-fixed-rate", ingested_bytes)
      | fieldsAdd other_volume = if(licensing_type == "other", ingested_bytes)

      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)

      | makeTimeseries interval: 15m, time: usage.start, by: {
        costallocation}, nonempty: true, {
        adaptive_volume = sum(adaptive_volume, default: 0),
        fixed_rate_volume = sum(fixed_rate_volume, default: 0),
        other_volume = sum(other_volume, default: 0),
        start = start()
      } 

        // calculate included volume per costcenter and join with trace-ingest usage
      | join [
          fetch dt.system.events, from: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from), to: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to) + 10min
          | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
          | filter event.type == "Full-Stack Monitoring"
          | fieldsAdd cap_type = "Traces - Ingest & Process"
          | filter in(cap_type, {$Capability}) //only query if trace ingest selected
          | dedup event.id, event.type
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
          | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
          | fieldsKeep usage.start, billed_gibibyte_hours, costallocation, event.id
          | makeTimeseries {
            billed = sum(billed_gibibyte_hours, default: 0) }, by: {
            costallocation }, time: usage.start, interval: 15m
          | summarize by: {
            timeframe, interval }, {
            total = sum(billed[]), r = collectArray(record(costallocation, billed)) }
          | expand r
          | fieldsFlatten r, fields: {
            costallocation, billed }
          | fieldsAdd ratio = iCollectArray(coalesce((billed)[] / total[], 0.0))
          | fields timeframe, interval, costallocation, ratio, billed, total
          | join [
              timeseries interval: 15m, union: true, nonempty: true, bucket: {"default_metrics"}, {
                included_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_included_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: 0),
                configured_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_configured_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: 0)
              }
              | fieldsAdd interval_in_minutes = toLong(interval) / 60000000000
              | fieldsAdd extra_ingest_on = configured_volume[] > included_volume[]
              | fieldsAdd included_volume = interval_in_minutes * if(isNull(configured_volume[]), null, else: included_volume[])
          
          ], on: {
            timeframe, interval }, fields: {
            included_volume, extra_ingest_on }
          | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = included_volume[] * ratio[]
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), "unassigned", else: costallocation)
          /**/
      ], on: {
         interval, costallocation }, kind: outer, prefix: "included."
       | fieldsAdd timeframe = coalesce(timeframe, included.timeframe)
       | fieldsAdd interval = coalesce(interval, included.interval)
       | fieldsAdd costallocation = coalesce(costallocation, included.costallocation)
      | join [
      //this creates an array of 0 with the correct length based on timeframe
        data
          record(a = 0)
          | makeTimeseries empty_included = avg(a, default: 0), interval: 15min, nonempty:true, time: now()
      ], on: { interval }, fields: { empty_included}, kind: outer
      //this creates an array of false with the correct length based on timeframe
      | join [
        data
          record(a = 0)
          | makeTimeseries empty_included = avg(a, default: 0), interval: 15min, nonempty:true, time: now()
          | expand empty_included
          | fieldsAdd all_false = empty_included==1
          | summarize all_false = collectArray(all_false), by: interval
      ], on: { interval }, fields: { all_false}
      //In cases where there's a costallocation in our BUE's but not in the included, set extra_ingest_on to false for each interval
      | fieldsAdd
          extra_ingest_on =
              if(exists(included.extra_ingest_on) and isNotNull(included.extra_ingest_on), included.extra_ingest_on,
                else: all_false)
      //We'll use this one to slice the others down to size
      | fieldsAdd adaptive_volume = coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(adaptive_volume[], 0)), empty_included)
      //Get rid of nulls, and make sure we're keeping only as many items as match our "volume"
      | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = arraySlice(coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(included.included_volume_costallocation[], 0)), empty_included), to: arraySize(adaptive_volume))
      //Replace nulls with 0
      | fieldsAdd fixed_rate_volume = coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(fixed_rate_volume[], 0)), empty_included)
      | fieldsAdd other_volume = coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(other_volume[], 0)), empty_included)
      | fieldsKeep timeframe, interval, costallocation, adaptive_volume, fixed_rate_volume, other_volume,
          included_volume_costallocation, extra_ingest_on, empty_included, start
     // calculate fullstack trace-ingest usage per costcenter
     | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = arraySlice(included_volume_costallocation, to: arraySize(adaptive_volume)) //Since we're looking into the future with included, cut off any "extra"
     | fieldsAdd license_remaining = included_volume_costallocation[] - adaptive_volume[]
     | fieldsAdd license_remaining = if(license_remaining[] > 0, license_remaining[], else: 0)
     | fieldsAdd extra_ingest_on = arraySlice(extra_ingest_on, to: arraySize(adaptive_volume)) //Depending on time frame, we can end up with an extra value here
     | fieldsAdd
          billable_fullstack =
              if(isNull(included_volume_costallocation[]), 0,
                else: if(extra_ingest_on[], adaptive_volume[] + fixed_rate_volume[] - included_volume_costallocation[],
                  else: fixed_rate_volume[] - license_remaining[]))

      | fieldsAdd billable_fullstack = if(billable_fullstack[] > 0, billable_fullstack[], else: 0)

      | summarize {
        total_included = sum(included_volume_costallocation[]),
        total_adaptive = sum(adaptive_volume[]),
        total_fixed_rate = sum(fixed_rate_volume[]),
        total_fullstack_to_allocate = sum(billable_fullstack[]),
        per_costallocation = collectArray(record(extra_ingest_on, billable_fullstack, billable_other = other_volume, costallocation, included_volume_costallocation, start))},
        by: { interval }
      | expand per_costallocation
      | fieldsFlatten per_costallocation
      | fieldsRemove per_costallocation

      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = total_included[] - total_adaptive[]
      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = if(total_license_remaining[] > 0, total_license_remaining[], else: 0)
      | fieldsAdd
          total_applicable_fullstack =
              if(isNull(per_costallocation.included_volume_costallocation), 0,
                else: if(per_costallocation.extra_ingest_on[], total_adaptive[] + total_fixed_rate[] - total_included[],
                  else: total_fixed_rate[] - total_license_remaining[]))
      | fieldsAdd total_billable_fullstack = if(total_applicable_fullstack[] > 0, total_applicable_fullstack[], else: 0)

      | fieldsAdd
          distributed_fullstack =
              if(total_fullstack_to_allocate[] <= 0, 0,
                else: per_costallocation.billable_fullstack[] / total_fullstack_to_allocate[] * total_billable_fullstack[])
      // filter out  entry if the included was not fetched
      | fieldsAdd
          adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation =
              per_costallocation.billable_other[] + toDouble(distributed_fullstack[])
     | filterOut isNull(adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation) or isNull(per_costallocation.start) or IsNull(per_costallocation.costallocation)
     | fields interval, costallocation = per_costallocation.costallocation, adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation, start=per_costallocation.start
     | fieldsAdd event.type ="Traces - Ingest & Process"
     | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation

] 
| fieldsAdd traces_usage = adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation[] / (1024*1024*1024)
// <---------THIS IS JUST FOR TRACES INGEST NORMALIZATION

// THIS IS JUST FOR METRICS INGEST NORMALIZATION ----->
| append [
      fetch dt.system.events, from: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from) + 4h, to: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to) + 4h
      | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Metrics - Ingest & Process"
      | filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
      | dedup event.id, event.type
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
      | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
      | expand costallocation
      | fieldsFlatten costallocation
      | fields {
        usage.start,
        costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation.key), $unassigned, else: costallocation.key),
        data_points = toLong(costallocation.data_points),
        monitoring_source = if(monitoring_source == "fullstack" or monitoring_source == "infrastructure", monitoring_source, else: "other")
      }
      | summarize {
        data_points = toLong(sum(data_points))
      }, by: {
        usage.start,
        costallocation,
        monitoring_source
      }
      | join [
          fetch dt.system.events, from: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from), to: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to) + 1h
          | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and in(event.type, { "Full-Stack Monitoring", "Infrastructure Monitoring" })
          | fieldsAdd cap_type = "Metrics - Ingest & Process"
          | filter in(cap_type, {$Capability}) //only query if metrics ingest selected
          | dedup event.id, event.type
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
          | fields {
            usage.start,
            costallocation = if(isNotNull(costallocation), costallocation, else: $unassigned),
            billed_value = coalesce(if(exists(billed_gibibyte_hours), billed_gibibyte_hours, else: null), if(exists(billed_host_hours), billed_host_hours, else: null)),
            monitoring_source = if(event.type == "Full-Stack Monitoring", "fullstack", else: if(event.type == "Infrastructure Monitoring", "infrastructure"))
          }
          | summarize {
            billed = sum(billed_value)
          }, by: {
            usage.start,
            costallocation,
            monitoring_source
          }
          | fields {
            usage.start,
            costallocation,
            monitoring_source,
            billed,
            included_usage =  billed * 4 * if(monitoring_source == "fullstack", 900, else: if(monitoring_source == "infrastructure", 1500, else: 0))
          }
      ], on: { usage.start, costallocation, monitoring_source }, kind:leftOuter, fields: { included_usage }
      | fieldsAdd included_usage = if(isNotNull(included_usage), included_usage, else: 0)
      | fieldsAdd billable = if(data_points > included_usage, data_points - included_usage, else: 0)
      | summarize {
        data_points_total = sum(data_points),
        included_total = sum(included_usage),
        billable_per_costallocation_total = sum(billable),
        rec = collectArray(record(costallocation, billable, included_usage))
      }, by: {
        usage.start,
        monitoring_source
      }
      | fieldsAdd actual_billable_total = if(data_points_total > included_total, data_points_total - included_total, else: 0)
      | expand rec
      | fieldsAdd ratio_for_cost_allocation = rec[billable] / billable_per_costallocation_total
      | fieldsAdd charged_per_costcenter = ratio_for_cost_allocation * actual_billable_total
      | fields usage = charged_per_costcenter, usage.start, costallocation = rec[costallocation]
      | makeTimeseries {usage = sum(usage), start=start()}, from:toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from), to:toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to), time:usage.start, interval: 15m, by:{costallocation}
      | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation
      | fieldsAdd event.type = "Metrics - Ingest & Process"
      | filter in(filter, {$Filter})
]
// <---------THIS IS JUST FOR METRICS INGEST NORMALIZATION


| lookup [
   data json:$price_points
], sourceField:event.type, lookupField:name, prefix: "ratecard."
| fieldsAdd isnull = isNull(adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation)
| fieldsAdd usage = if(isnull, usage, else: traces_usage)
| fieldsAdd cost = usage[] * toDouble(ratecard.price) / toDouble(ratecard.priceUnit)
| fieldsAdd cost = arraySum(cost)
| fieldsAdd usage = arraySum(usage)
//The summarize details would change based on intended tile
| filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
| summarize {total_usage=sum(usage), total_cost=sum(cost)}, by:{capability=event.type,filter, category=ratecard.Category}
| sort total_cost desc

9.title: Estimated cost distribution per cost center
9.description: Showing only values above 5% of total costs
9.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
| filterOut event.type == "Traces - Ingest & Process" //traces ingest needs special handling
| filterOut event.type == "Metrics - Ingest & Process" //metrics ingest needs special handling
| filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
| dedup event.id, event.type
| fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
| fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)
| fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
| expand costallocation
| fieldsAdd filter = coalesce(costallocation[key], costallocation)
| filter in(filter, {$Filter}) or isNull(filter)
| fieldsAdd billed_bytes = coalesce(costallocation[billed_bytes], billed_bytes)
| fieldsAdd usage = coalesce(
    billed_host_hours, //Infra, F&D
    billed_gibibyte_hours, //Fullstack, Runtime Application Protection, Runtime Vulnerability Analytics
    toDouble(billed_bytes) / (1024*1024*1024), //ALL I/R/Q
    billed_invocations, //AppEngine
    ingested_bytes, //Traces I
    billed_sessions, //RUM sessions
    billed_replay_sessions, //rum replay sessions
    billed_property_sessions, //rum properties
    billed_pod_hours, //k8s platform monitoring
    billed_container_hours, //Code Monitoring
    billed_synthetic_action_count, //Browser Monitor
    billed_http_request_count, //HTTP Monitor
    billed_msu_hours, //Mainframe
    1 //workflow count
    )
| fieldsAdd usage = if(contains(event.type,"Retain"),usage / 24, else: usage)
| fieldsAdd usage.start = if(isNull(usage.start), timestamp, else: usage.start)
| makeTimeseries interval: 15m, from: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from) - 30m,
   to: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to), time: usage.start, by:{filter, event.type }, {
  usage = sum(usage),
  start = start()
}
// THIS IS JUST FOR TRACES INGEST NORMALIZATION ----->
| append [
      fetch dt.system.events
      | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Traces - Ingest & Process"
      | filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
      | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
      | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation
      | filter in(filter, {$Filter}) or isnull(filter)
      | fieldsKeep usage.start, licensing_type, ingested_bytes, costallocation, event.id
      | dedup event.id
      | fieldsAdd licensing_type = if(in(licensing_type, {
        "otlp-trace-ingest", "serverless"}), "other", else: licensing_type)

      | fieldsAdd adaptive_volume = if(licensing_type == "fullstack-adaptive", ingested_bytes)
      | fieldsAdd fixed_rate_volume = if(licensing_type == "fullstack-fixed-rate", ingested_bytes)
      | fieldsAdd other_volume = if(licensing_type == "other", ingested_bytes)

      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)

      | makeTimeseries interval: 15m, time: usage.start, by: {
        costallocation}, nonempty: true, {
        adaptive_volume = sum(adaptive_volume, default: 0),
        fixed_rate_volume = sum(fixed_rate_volume, default: 0),
        other_volume = sum(other_volume, default: 0),
        start = start()
      } 

        // calculate included volume per costcenter and join with trace-ingest usage
      | join [
          fetch dt.system.events, from: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from), to: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to) + 10min
          | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
          | filter event.type == "Full-Stack Monitoring"
          | fieldsAdd cap_type = "Traces - Ingest & Process"
          | filter in(cap_type, {$Capability}) //only query if trace ingest selected
          | dedup event.id, event.type
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
          | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
          | fieldsKeep usage.start, billed_gibibyte_hours, costallocation, event.id
          | makeTimeseries {
            billed = sum(billed_gibibyte_hours, default: 0) }, by: {
            costallocation }, time: usage.start, interval: 15m
          | summarize by: {
            timeframe, interval }, {
            total = sum(billed[]), r = collectArray(record(costallocation, billed)) }
          | expand r
          | fieldsFlatten r, fields: {
            costallocation, billed }
          | fieldsAdd ratio = iCollectArray(coalesce((billed)[] / total[], 0.0))
          | fields timeframe, interval, costallocation, ratio, billed, total
          | join [
              timeseries interval: 15m, union: true, nonempty: true, bucket: {"default_metrics"}, {
                included_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_included_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: 0),
                configured_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_configured_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: 0)
              }
              | fieldsAdd interval_in_minutes = toLong(interval) / 60000000000
              | fieldsAdd extra_ingest_on = configured_volume[] > included_volume[]
              | fieldsAdd included_volume = interval_in_minutes * if(isNull(configured_volume[]), null, else: included_volume[])
          
          ], on: {
            timeframe, interval }, fields: {
            included_volume, extra_ingest_on }
          | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = included_volume[] * ratio[]
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), "unassigned", else: costallocation)
          /**/
      ], on: {
         interval, costallocation }, kind: outer, prefix: "included."
       | fieldsAdd timeframe = coalesce(timeframe, included.timeframe)
       | fieldsAdd interval = coalesce(interval, included.interval)
       | fieldsAdd costallocation = coalesce(costallocation, included.costallocation)
      | join [
      //this creates an array of 0 with the correct length based on timeframe
        data
          record(a = 0)
          | makeTimeseries empty_included = avg(a, default: 0), interval: 15min, nonempty:true, time: now()
      ], on: { interval }, fields: { empty_included}, kind: outer
      //this creates an array of false with the correct length based on timeframe
      | join [
        data
          record(a = 0)
          | makeTimeseries empty_included = avg(a, default: 0), interval: 15min, nonempty:true, time: now()
          | expand empty_included
          | fieldsAdd all_false = empty_included==1
          | summarize all_false = collectArray(all_false), by: interval
      ], on: { interval }, fields: { all_false}
      //In cases where there's a costallocation in our BUE's but not in the included, set extra_ingest_on to false for each interval
      | fieldsAdd
          extra_ingest_on =
              if(exists(included.extra_ingest_on) and isNotNull(included.extra_ingest_on), included.extra_ingest_on,
                else: all_false)
      //We'll use this one to slice the others down to size
      | fieldsAdd adaptive_volume = coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(adaptive_volume[], 0)), empty_included)
      //Get rid of nulls, and make sure we're keeping only as many items as match our "volume"
      | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = arraySlice(coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(included.included_volume_costallocation[], 0)), empty_included), to: arraySize(adaptive_volume))
      //Replace nulls with 0
      | fieldsAdd fixed_rate_volume = coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(fixed_rate_volume[], 0)), empty_included)
      | fieldsAdd other_volume = coalesce(iCollectArray(coalesce(other_volume[], 0)), empty_included)
      | fieldsKeep timeframe, interval, costallocation, adaptive_volume, fixed_rate_volume, other_volume,
          included_volume_costallocation, extra_ingest_on, empty_included, start
     // calculate fullstack trace-ingest usage per costcenter
     | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = arraySlice(included_volume_costallocation, to: arraySize(adaptive_volume)) //Since we're looking into the future with included, cut off any "extra"
     | fieldsAdd license_remaining = included_volume_costallocation[] - adaptive_volume[]
     | fieldsAdd license_remaining = if(license_remaining[] > 0, license_remaining[], else: 0)
     | fieldsAdd extra_ingest_on = arraySlice(extra_ingest_on, to: arraySize(adaptive_volume)) //Depending on time frame, we can end up with an extra value here
     | fieldsAdd
          billable_fullstack =
              if(isNull(included_volume_costallocation[]), 0,
                else: if(extra_ingest_on[], adaptive_volume[] + fixed_rate_volume[] - included_volume_costallocation[],
                  else: fixed_rate_volume[] - license_remaining[]))

      | fieldsAdd billable_fullstack = if(billable_fullstack[] > 0, billable_fullstack[], else: 0)

      | summarize {
        total_included = sum(included_volume_costallocation[]),
        total_adaptive = sum(adaptive_volume[]),
        total_fixed_rate = sum(fixed_rate_volume[]),
        total_fullstack_to_allocate = sum(billable_fullstack[]),
        per_costallocation = collectArray(record(extra_ingest_on, billable_fullstack, billable_other = other_volume, costallocation, included_volume_costallocation, start))},
        by: { interval }
      | expand per_costallocation
      | fieldsFlatten per_costallocation
      | fieldsRemove per_costallocation

      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = total_included[] - total_adaptive[]
      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = if(total_license_remaining[] > 0, total_license_remaining[], else: 0)
      | fieldsAdd

      // filter out  entry if the included was not fetched

     | filterOut isNull(adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation) or isNull(per_costallocation.start) or IsNull(per_costallocation.costallocation)
     | fields interval, costallocation = per_costallocation.costallocation, adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation, start=per_costallocation.start

10.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
| filterOut event.type == "Traces - Ingest & Process" //traces ingest needs special handling
| filterOut event.type == "Metrics - Ingest & Process" //metrics ingest needs special handling
